title: The Sky Hangar
lines: At the very edge of the orange sands, a gargantuan structure of rusted steel looms out of the dunes. It is an ancient aircraft hangar, its great doors long since torn away.
Inside, the floor is buried under centuries of fine silt, but in the center, something impossible remains: a translucent, glowing staircase spiraling into the bruised-purple sky.
The stairs hum with a faint, low-frequency vibration that you can feel in your teeth.

options.desc: 2. Search the rusted scaffolding for supplies
3. Retreat back into the open desert
